_doc: Per-route bundle-size budgets in gzipped bytes. CI breaks when the measured first-paint chunk exceeds 'hardLimit'; warns when ≥ softLimit. See tools/bundle-budget/check.mjs and docs/operations/RUNBOOKS/bundle-budget.md.
_baseline: PRX-25-PERF-01 initial budgets — tuned per the EXPANDED.md target devices (Moto G4 throttled). Site routes raised after first measurement to reflect Next.js 15 framework baseline (framework + react + polyfills ≈ 220 KB gz); follow-up to refine site attribution per-page instead of total-chunk-sum.

site://.name: marketing-home
site://._notes: 280 KB gz hard / 240 KB soft — Next.js 15 SSG baseline. The check sums all chunks under .next/static/chunks; per-page attribution lands in a follow-up that exposes the BUNDLE_BUDGET_SITE_DIST per-page path.

site:/modules.name: marketing-module-pages
site:/modules._notes: ENH-03 streaming SSR reduces TTI, not bundle size; same baseline as home

web://.name: webapp-shell
web://._notes: ≤ 180 KB gz; includes React + router + query

web:/focus.name: module-focus-hero
web:/focus._notes: ≤ 90 KB gz first-paint chunk; xstate + state machine

web:/write.name: module-writing-space
web:/write._notes: editor stack (Tiptap pending ADR-0015) inflates; budget raised to 120 KB gz
